payment_terms: 30 days from Customer's receipt of invoice
services_description: Provider will design, develop, and deploy a custom data analytics dashboard including data pipeline integration, user interface design, and automated reporting features
fee_description: $15,000 fixed fee for the project, billed in three milestone payments of $5,000 each upon completion of design, development, and deployment phases
customer_obligations: Customer will designate a single point of contact for all project communications and provide timely access to required data sources and systems
travel_expense_policy: All travel requires prior written approval; reimbursement per Provider's standard travel policy
customer_owned_deliverables: Custom API integrations, data migration scripts, and training documentation
